prompt:
You are shown the last 1-2 rendered pages (in order) of the region for "Item 9A. Controls and Procedures". The next section is "Item 10. Directors, Executive Officers and Corporate Governance".
Find where Item 9A ends — right before the "Item 10" heading if it appears, otherwise the very bottom of the last page — and transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 9A before that point. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Changes in Internal Control over Financial Reporting
There were no changes in our internal control over financial reporting (as such term is defined in Rules 13a-15(f) and 15d-15(f) of the Exchange Act)
during the most recent fiscal quarter that have materially affected, or are reasonably likely to materially affect, our internal control over financial
reporting.
